summary: Iteration 3: CMS Integration and GSC Redirect Testing Complete. All 10 backend API tests passed (100%). All 11 frontend tests passed (100%). CMS API correctly returns 9 service pages with intro_paragraphs. Service pages (refrigerator, garbage-disposal, cooktop, wine-cooler) load CMS content correctly showing 'About [Appliance] Repair' section. All redirect routes working: suffix→prefix city redirects, non-approved cities→/service-areas, /reviews→/#reviews, /stacked-washer-dryer-repair→/washer-repair.
critical_code_review_comments: CMS integration implemented with graceful fallback - if CMS API fails, hardcoded content is shown (good pattern)
useCMSContent hook silently catches errors and falls back to props-based content
All 9 service pages have intro_paragraphs in CMS that override serviceDescription.paragraphs in the template
seed_data_creation: None needed - CMS data already seeded in MongoDB
context_for_next_testing_agent: CMS integration fully working. Service pages fetch content from /api/cms/service-pages/{slug} and display intro_paragraphs in 'About [Appliance] Repair' section. All redirect routes tested: (1) /san-rafael-appliance-repair → /appliance-repair-san-rafael (suffix→prefix), (2) /dublin-appliance-repair → /service-areas (non-approved city), (3) /stacked-washer-dryer-repair → /washer-repair, (4) /appliance-repair-palo-alto → /service-areas, (5) /reviews → /#reviews, (6) /appliance-repair-livermore → /service-areas. Approved city /appliance-repair-san-bruno loads correctly without redirect.

frontend.refrigerator_repair_cms_content: PASS - 'About Refrigerator Repair' section with 3 intro paragraphs from CMS
frontend.approved_city_san_bruno_loads: PASS - no redirect, content loads correctly
